title: grants — broadcast channels
description: Two broadcast channels this module owns. Registered by `GrantServiceProvider::registerBroadcastChannels()`. Tenant-scoped channel for admin dashboards; user-scoped channel for the subject's live 'my access' view.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.grants
channels.description: Every grant lifecycle event broadcasts here. Admin dashboards subscribe on the grants list screen; audit-resource screens subscribe filtered. Batched — a burst of bulk-provision inserts (100 rows in 5s) coalesces to a summary broadcast per second.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has `grants.viewAny`

channels.name: user.{userId}.grants
channels.description: Per-subject channel — every grant on this User broadcasts here. Consumed by the subject's 'my access' view in the tenant dashboard so they see grants appear + disappear live. Also consumed by the notification bell for the subject.
channels.filter: Only broadcasts when the User (userId) is the SUBJECT of the grant. Not the grantor — grantors see events on the tenant channel.
